title: CollectionItem
description: A work in the City's public art and monument collection, of which PDC is caretaker and curator. Canonical schema for the 'Public Design Commission Outdoor Public Art Inventory' dataset (2pg3-gcaa, 43 columns) — City-owned monuments, memorials, artworks, and markers installed outdoors on City-owned property. Carries title, artist/architect/landscape-architect credits, material, artwork type, location, managing agency, dedication/creation dates, inscription, and Block/Lot + latitude/longitude for geolocation.

artworkType1.description: 'Artwork Type1' — primary form (e.g. Bust, Statue, Bas-relief, Column, Fountain, Flagpole, Plaque, Arch).

creators.description: People/organizations credited on the work — reconciled from the primary/secondary artist, primary/secondary architect, landscape architect, architecture firm, foundry, and fabricator columns.

artistsKeyword.description: 'Artists Keyword' — free-text artist keyword search field.

dateCreatedApproximation.description: 'Date Created_Approximation' — Y/N flag for whether the creation date is approximate.

dateDedicatedApproximation.description: 'Date Dedicated_Approximation?' — Y/N flag for whether the dedication date is approximate.

acquisition.description: 'Acquisition' — how the City acquired the work (e.g. gift, commission).

locationName.description: 'Location Name' — park, plaza, or building where the work is sited (e.g. Flushing Meadows Corona Park).

managingCityAgency.description: 'Managing City Agency' — the agency responsible for the work's day-to-day custody/maintenance (often Parks or DOT).

pdcRecords.description: 'PDC Records' — reference(s) to PDC's own archive records for the work.

block.description: 'Block' — tax block of the parcel the work sits on.
